summary: This document contains financial and operational data from pilot proposals, including ROI calculations showing a 4.2x return and weekly time commitment tracking for receptionists and GPs. It also outlines a comprehensive risk mitigation table addressing clinical safety, adoption barriers, and data security measures for the AI phone agent system.
